---
title: "SEIRS with Leaky Vaccination"
description: "Implements leaky vaccination where protection reduces (rather than eliminates) infection risk, on an SEIRS model with waning immunity and vital dynamics."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-12-01"
categories: [SEIRS, vaccination, vaccine efficacy, vital dynamics, intermediate]
order: 4
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
